name: voicebridge
description: Hands-free, two-way voice for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Ollama) from your phone. Free, source-available, no ElevenLabs. Browser voice plus optional local Whisper STT through a tiny Node bridge.

scripts.lint: eslint server.js test/*.js examples/**/*.js desktop/main.js desktop/preload.js desktop/lib/*.js desktop/renderer/*.js desktop/test/*.js
